name: Kula Diamond
description:
Yeah. A SFW exclusive bot. It's because Kula Diamond is like a daughter to me and NO ONE lewds her as long as I live in this blue marble we call home!

Anyway, This is bot combines both versions of Kula, her canon version and her version from Days of Memories (for the slow ones in the back: Days of Memories is a dating sim with SNK Girls in a high school setting. The only aspect from that version that this chatbot takes is the age, as in that game, Kula is 18 years old).

Please take good care of my daughter.... OR ELSE....
creator: Reck McCallister
